name: Asthosus
author: Catser
description:
A mod that adds a new planet, Asthosus, into the game.
  
Asthosus is a deserted planet. A wasteland filled with danger.
It has a fully playable campaign with 11 campaign and 21 optional maps. 

Aside from these 32 maps, Asthosus contains over 180 pieces of unique content,
including blocks, liquids, items, units and status effects.
This number is not counting any internal units or environment blocks/tiles.

I aimed to re-use nearly no vanilla content and instead fill the mod 
with new and (hopefully) exciting things.

The mod comes with it's own custom music, made by ThePythonGuy3!

If you find any issues or want to tell me anything else,
feel free to join the Asthosus Discord server. 
The same thing goes for when you need help with this mod.

Asthosus is available in the following languages:
- English
- German
- Indonesian
- Russian
- Ukrainian
- Traditional Chinese
- Simplified Chinese

Enjoy!

author: [#3bdbff]CY4N[white] & [#11d41e]Zielony TrГіjkД…t[white]
description:
[yellow]Before you'll play this mod, let me tell you that [red]skill and patience are highly required.
[yellow]You need to learn from your mistakes and lost battles in order to complete some sectors.[white]
Welcome to the Frozen farlands,
here, where there is no such thing called heat, Serpulo's Moon Awaits you!
Zilo, a place colonized by Bushark the fraction from Tantros,
Even if that's only a moon there are many new things, new resources, blocks, units, turrets, just everything.
There is one more place we would like you to visit... GheЕЈar
A Lonely Asteroid orbiting behind Zilo,
Maybe it's a small place but it doesn't means it is going to be easy in there, but surely you'd be having fun...

This mod contains custom soundtracks, please do not steal them... instead get a better vibe while playing
And Thanks to [#8c0303]Еҡwirek[white] for helping us with code.
We hope you'll enjoy our mod
This Isn't our last creation, we have a huge plans upcoming, if you are interested in our plans, concepts and updates join our discord server
Our contributtors: [#36a855]RouterXdd[white], [#327db3]Silin Veredno[white] and [#dba642]Catana8735[white]

name: Helium
author: EBwilson
description:
A mod provide optimized ui and more utilities.
Major features:
- ***In-Game Entity Information Components***: Provides various UI elements for game entities including units and blocks
- ***Health & Status Indicators***: Displays real-time status (health, shields) above units and entities. When shield stacks exceed max health, multi-layer shields with stack counters are shown.
- ***Attack Range Indicators***: Units and turrets now visualize their attack ranges as translucent areas. Processed boundaries emphasize combined team range contours to prevent visual clutter, with subtle pulsating animations and chromatic borders.
- ***Functional Block Effect Range Indicators***: Devices like Mend Projectors, Overdrive Projectors, and unit repair stations display effect ranges with distinctive colors.
- ***Enhanced Block Placement Panel***: A refined block selection panel integrating a quick item bar and standardized tool buttons.
- ***The better Mod Manager and Mod Browser***: Reworked the Mods Manager and Mods Browser, now they looks more aesthetically pleasing and functional

name: Azimut
author: DeerCarbonate
description:
A hybrid mod primarily built around Erekir and its linear progression system. The mod introduces new gameplay mechanics that are tightly integrated into the campaign and accompany you throughout the entire playthrough.
The mod also has a Discord server вҖ” you can find the link in the README file on the GitHub page.

THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT!
At the moment, development is approximately 47% complete and features 9 fully polished sectors.

////////////////////////////////

Land on a subcryogenic terra, gradually warming under its star, known as Gelion.
Your objective is to eliminate enemy forces on the planet, secure rare resources, and continue your expansion across the galaxy.

Limited space and complex logistics present a serious challenge. Plan your production wisely!

If you enjoy the mod, consider giving it a star! >~<
Thanks for playing!

Specials thanks to: ace1020spawn, Kivet/Р‘РһР‘, Alpotat, KOSTOLOM, Fate of Adrastus

name: Betterustry Mod
author: D&X
description:
RU: РһСҮРөРҪСҢ РҫРҝР°СҒРҪСӢР№ РјРҫРҙ, РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСӢР№ РІР»РёСҸРөСӮ РҪР° РұР°Р»Р°РҪСҒ Рё РјРөС…Р°РҪРёРәСғ РёРіСҖСӢ, РҙРҫРұР°РІР»СҸРөСӮ РҪРҫРІСӢР№ РәРҫРҪСӮРөРҪСӮ РІ РІРёРҙРө СҒСӮР°СӮСғСҒРҫРІ СҚС„С„РөРәСӮР° Рё РҫРұРҫСҖРҫРҪРёСӮРөР»СҢРҪСӢС… СҒРҫРҫСҖСғР¶РөРҪРёР№ (РұР°СҲРөРҪ, РјРёРҪ Рё СӮ.Рҙ.).

Р РөРәРҫРјРөРҪРҙСғРөСӮСҒСҸ РҝРөСҖРөРҙ СғСҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРәРҫР№ СҒРҙРөР»Р°СӮСҢ СҒРҫС…СҖР°РҪРөРҪРёРө (СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РҫСӮРәР°СӮРёСӮСҢСҒСҸ РҪР°Р·Р°Рҙ), РөСҒР»Рё РІ СҒР»СғСҮР°Рө РІР°Рј РҪРө РҝРҫРҪСҖР°РІРёСӮСҒСҸ СӮРҫ, СҮСӮРҫ РјРҫР¶РөСӮ СҒРҙРөР»Р°СӮСҢ РҙР°РҪРҪСӢР№ РјРҫРҙ. Рҳ Р»СғСҮСҲРө РІ СҒР°РјРҫРј РҙРөР»Рө РҪРө СҖРёСҒРәСғР№СӮРө Р»РёСҲРҪРёР№ СҖР°Р· Рё РҝРҫРІРөСҖСҢСӮРө РҪР° СҒР»РҫРІРҫ: РңРһР”. РңР•РқРҜР•Рў. РңРқРһР“РһР•.



ENG: A very dangerous mod that affects the balance and mechanics of the game, adds new content in the form of status effects and defensive structures (towers, mines, etc.).


Preferably before installing make a save (to roll back), if in case you do not like what this mod can do. And it is better to really do not take unnecessary risks and take my word for it: MOD. CHANGES. MULTIPLE.

name: Carpe Diem
author: Nullotte
description:
A peaceful campaign mod which focuses on factory building.

Build production lines, decode archives, and launch landing pods across the sectors of Asphodel, a cold planet ravaged by the forces of war. Salvage what remains of the Coalition, and restore their industry to its former glory.

This mod is mostly complete in terms of implemented content, but its campaign is still unfinished. Either way, I hope you'll enjoy what the mod has to offer.

author:
[#ff]retodera[] - РҫСҒРҪРҫРІР°СӮРөР»СҢ РјРҫРҙР° Рё РөРҙРёРҪСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪСӢР№ СҖР°РұРҫСӮР°СҺСүРёР№ РҪР°Рҙ РҪРёРј

Рҗ СӮР°РәР¶Рө РұР»Р°РіРҫРҙР°СҖРҪРҫСҒСӮРё:

xDer - РіРөРҪРөСҖР°СӮРҫСҖ РёРҙРөР№

РҹСҖРёР·СҖР°Рә - РҫСҒРҪРҫРІР°СӮРөР»СҢ СҒРөСҖРІРөСҖР° Р”РёСҒРәРҫСҖРҙ

gkugfk3 - СҒРҙРөР»Р°Р» СҒР°СғРҪРҙСӮСҖРөРә

Рҳ РІСҒРө, РәСӮРҫ РҝРҫСҒСӮР°РІРёР»Рё Р·РІС‘Р·РҙРҫСҮРәСғ <3
description:
<RU>[]

[#00fff2]Technologium[] РұСғРҙРөСӮ РҫСҮРөСҖРөРҙРҪСӢРј РұРҫР»СҢСҲРёРј РјРҫРҙРҫРј РҙР»СҸ Mindustry. РЈР¶Рө РјРҪРҫРіРҫРө Р·Р°РҝР»Р°РҪРёСҖРҫРІР°РҪРҫ, С…РҫСӮСҸ РҝСҖР°РәСӮРёСҮРөСҒРәРё РҪРёСҮСӮРҫ РёР· СҚСӮРҫРіРҫ РҪРө СҒРҙРөР»Р°РҪРҫ.



РңРҫРҙ РұСғРҙРөСӮ СҒРҫРҙРөСҖР¶Р°СӮСҢ РІ СҒРөРұРө 2 СҒРҫР»РҪРөСҮРҪСӢРө СҒРёСҒСӮРөРјСӢ, РјРҫР¶РөСӮ РҙР°Р¶Рө РұРҫР»СҢСҲРө; РјРҪРҫР¶РөСҒСӮРІРҫ РҪРҫРІСӢС… РјРөС…Р°РҪРёРә, РјРҪРҫРіРҫ РәР°РјРҝР°РҪРёР№, РөСүС‘ РұРҫР»СҢСҲРө РұР»РҫРәРҫРІ, РҫСҒРҫРұРөРҪРҪРҫ РҝСҖРөРҙРјРөСӮРҫРІ, Р¶РёРҙРәРҫСҒСӮРөР№, СҺРҪРёСӮРҫРІ Рё РҪРө СӮРҫР»СҢРәРҫ.

РҹРҫРәР° СҮСӮРҫ, СӮРҫР»СҢРәРҫ РҫРҙРёРҪ СҮРөР»РҫРІРөРә - retodera - СҖР°РұРҫСӮР°РөСӮ РҪР°Рҙ РјРҫРҙРҫРј. РқРҫ, РөСҒР»Рё РІСӢ С…РҫСҖРҫСҲРёР№ СҒРҝСҖР°Р№СӮРөСҖ/РәРҫРҙРөСҖ, РІСӢ РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РҝРҫРјРҫСҮСҢ РјРҪРө СҒ РІСҒРөРј СҚСӮРёРј. 
Р•СҒР»Рё СҚСӮРҫ РҪРө СӮР°Рә, РІСӢ РІСҒС‘ РөСүС‘ РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РјРҫСӮРёРІРёСҖРҫРІР°СӮСҢ РјРөРҪСҸ, РҝРҫСҒСӮР°РІРёРІ Р·РІС‘Р·РҙРҫСҮРәСғ РҪР° СҖРөРҝРҫР·РёСӮРҫСҖРёРё.

Р’СӢ СӮР°РәР¶Рө РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РҝСҖРёСҒРҫРөРҙРёРҪРёСӮСҢСҒСҸ Рә РҪР°СҲРөРјСғ РіРҫРІРҪРҫСҒРөСҖРІРөСҖСғ Р”РёСҒРәРҫСҖРҙ РІ СҖРөРҝРҫР·РёСӮРҫСҖРёРё.

[#7f7f7f]РңРҫРҙ РҙРҫР»Р¶РөРҪ СҖР°СҒСӮРё.[]




<ENG>[]

[#00fff2]Technologium[] will be another big mod for Mindustry. There's already so much planned, though practically none of it is finished.



The mod will contain a whole 2 solar systems, or maybe even more; lots of new mechanics, many campaigns, even more blocks, especially items, liquids, units and not only.

For now, only one person - retodera - works on the mod. But, if you're a good spriter/coder, you could help me with all of this. 
If not, you could still motivate me by giving a star on the repository.

You also could join our shitty Discord server in the repository.

[#7f7f7f]The mod must grow.[]

name: Echo Fleet
author:
Dev - Blehhhh cat
Contributors - Kamikazefoxmk.i, Tinport, Aerodynamic Attorney 
Music Composer - Ace1020spawn
description:
A mod that adds a new planet, Kaltos, and its moon, Aetheria into the game.
  
[royal]Kaltos[] is an ancient and once life blooming planet. Now ruined by eras of industrial abuse, the life became scarce and the planet is undergoing constant ice ages. It's infested with ruins of ancient factions. 
[gold]Aetheria[] on the other hand, was always a deserted, hot celestial body. Thus resulting in 2 different factions present on [royal]Kaltos[] and [gold]Aetheria[]. 

[red]This mod is still in early development,[] as of now it only adds a bunch of [accent]sandbox only blocks[] and [accent]environment tiles[]. Several sectors have been made already, more are yet to come. It also has custom music. 

Other then that, the mod focuses on [accent]complex factories[] and [accent]refining Crude Oil[]. 

[accent]I re-used no content from vanilla, even though this mod seemingly has several things from it. 

[red]Currently the mod is way too early into development to have any proper translations. 

[]Have fun with whats already added, I guess. :)

name: Enhancement Units
author: D&X
description:
ATTENTION:

From now on, the mod goes into experimental mode - this means that the balance may not be balanced, such as a Toxopid with a Corvus, whose attack radii go far beyond 60 cells!!!!!
Nevertheless, I advise you to calm down: when the mod reaches its peak (despite my crazy plans for it, the result of which you are already watching), I will make several versions to meet the needs of as many people as possible. In the meantime, it remains to wait. Sorry for the inconvenience.

Important:

This mod does not bring anything radically new to the game, but only expands the combat functionality of existing combat units.

Please pay attention:

The mod significantly redesigns units, changes the balance and generally complicates the game. Don't forget to make a backup in case you don't like the changes that the mod itself makes.

P.S. The mod is made for ALE maps.

name: Auto Research
author: Flin
description:
A simple mod that researches content automatically.

Algorithm description:
Looks up for avaliable tech nodes with all the objectives completed, then sorts them by real cost.

First of all it unlocks content like maps and items (with no costs), then it researches the cheapest node with the avaliable items in the planet.

You can disable the auto-research in Settings/Game/Auto Research

name: Etigei Exile
author: [lime]Mitemi[lightgray] & [cyan]Tikup
description:
Etigei Exilium offers a fresh and uniquely creative modded experience, featuring two planets and adding 161 blocks, 23 items, 22 units, and 20 sectors. 

Establish colonies on the frozen planet of [sky]Neoulandia[white] and experience its own tech tree, destructible environment, such as destructible trees from which you can harvest timber, emphasis on unit cargo, and unique map design. The entire Neoulandia campaign is intimately interconnected with each map being adjacent and having connections to other maps, branching into economy-focused sectors or classic survival or attack maps. 

[orange]Rubiginosus[white] presents a collection of hardcore maps, inspired by Rusted Warfare, initially designed for multiplayer using Serpulo and Erekir technology. These missions have been retrofitted for a campaign experience with unique challenges for each map. Completing the Rubiginosus campaign will unlock a special resource on Neoulandia.

[red]Requires Timber (EDT) as a dependency.

[white]Discord:[blue] https://discord.com/invite/TJKZgr6UDg

HanLarence, petal - Major help with sprites and more
Click, Hurb, Nameless - Minor help with sprites and ideas
Eris - Troubleshooting
description:
Your schemes and saves are prone to corruption. Export your data before updating.

An extremely large mod solely dedicated for mindustry roleplaying and builds alike.

QRM V7.1 aims to fix most of the bugs found after v7's release.
QRM v7 Changelog:
Added
- Beveled sorters, Highlighted sorters, and Unloader Two chiseled sets
- Way, way more chiseled diagonal variants 
- Chiseled diagonal duct router and bezeled sets
- Hazel, Tyrian, Royal, Terracotta, Pale, Graphene Walls
- Ash and Alternate sand and red sand env walls 
- RGBCMY + White, Black Overlay floors
- CMY, Sorter gray + Source yellow floors
- Thunder, Windstorm, Thunderstorm, Rain and Ping SFX blocks
- Void messages
- Vials readded
- Message blocks that look like RP books
- [WIP] Particle gen with changeable colours via ammo
- Powerline Blockers (invisible plast walls)
- Arrow block that looks like a logic block (Path Cell)
- Ritual circles

Fixed
- Large slate message being omega
- Flat surge router is flat unloader
- Stone colour walls being named snow
- Cruiser being implemented
- Slower emanates
- All unit building
- Rocky en stairs being offset
- Config mender now a unloader
- Config nodes having glow
- Unloader two a sorter now
- Revert noise sorter changes, now unlegacy'd

QRM v7.1 Changelog
Fixed
- Bezeled chiseled side-line being offset
- Transperant, white, black item source having the wrong name
- Liquid router source not having a texture
- Particle generators not being invisible 
- Normal, inverted, highlight, bezel, spectral, source centered corners, diagonal router corner 3 being offset
- Config stuff not being flat
- Sorter gray colour 5 being olive
- Open Item Vial not being able to rotate
- Full liquid vials being able to rotate, even they can't visually
- Books resprite

Added
- Borderless item source (for SFX turrets)
- Flat beveled, highlight sorters
- More books
- Duct router catears

Removed
- Extra surge router slope corner

Version v7.1

name: New Console Hardline
author: Mnemotechnician (original developer), SMOLKEYS (port maintainer)
description:
The officially acknowledged port of New Console for v147-above.

Adds a console UI superior to the built-in one and the ones provided by any other mods.
User-friendly interface, an actual code editor with syntax highlighting and indentation guides, assistance and more:
A good log panel, execution history - all of that is included in this mod.

In addition to the console, this mod offers:
- An ability to save as many scripts as you want and to either execute them or copy to the console
- An ability to execute scripts when certain events get fired
- A full-blown file browser (be careful, you can cause real harm with that!)

See README.md for more info.

kjol: a surging cold moon was the last history before the D##N#7# incident.

]
Vengeance will happen

name: Project Reindustrialization
author: MaboroshiX
description:
OBJECT: Retrieve the forgotten technology.

A mod inspired by Greg's Tech that makes manufacturing realistic and even harder.
Remade and improved version of Reindustrialization.

Mod features:
- Distinct style of gameplay with hardcore production.
- A separate and complex tech tree.
- Multi-crafters and intermediates.
- Pipe corrosion and more mechanics stolen from Greg's Tech.

This mod is part of Lovecraftian series, which requires Lovecraftian Library and Lovecraftian Laboratory.

WARNING: RECIPE HELL AHEAD!

name: Operation: Aziris
author: Slashkig, IAmRustee, VoidThreader, Phil
description:
[#ff0000]Aziris[] is a planet of breathtaking beauty and immense value, coveted by many factions for its rare and powerful [#bf2851]Erythronite Crystals[]. It has remained in the hands of the [blue]Sentinels[] for centuries. It is up to you to conquer this planet and seize its resources for yourself.

-------

This is a WIP mod that adds a new planet, Aziris, with plenty of new content to explore. There isn't a campaign yet, but all mod content can be checked out in sandbox, and you can join the discord for custom maps (and more!):
[purple]https://discord.gg/2qc4WaCreP []

name: Browser Windows (MinduCEF)
author: Ion - 7274
description:
A mod that allows you to create browser windows directly in the game.
You can interact with them, they process clicks, and you can watch videos, read articles, or just play games.
[red]Warning! Be prepared for the fact that some sites may not be supported, and some games may not work due to capture features.
[scarlet]Although the mod supports Android devices, there is no guarantee that they will work stably. A different API is used to support Android, as they do not support JCEF.
[stat]The mod can support servers, but a plugin is required for this. Request it from Ion - 7274 (Discord: koctz34). (I will probably release the plugin file along with updates soon).
[scarlet]This mod does not working on Linux and MacOS.[]

frozen farlands description:

[yellow]Before you'll play this mod, let me tell you that [red]skill and patience are highly required.
[yellow]You need to learn from your mistakes and lost battles in order to complete some sectors.[white]
Welcome to the Frozen farlands,
here, where there is no such thing called heat, Serpulo's Moon Awaits you!
Zilo, a place colonized by Bushark the fraction from Tantros,
Even if that's only a moon there are many new things, new resources, blocks, units, turrets, just everything.
There is one more place we would like you to visit... GheЕЈar
A Lonely Asteroid orbiting behind Zilo,
Maybe it's a small place but it doesn't means it is going to be easy in there, but surely you'd be having fun...

This mod contains custom soundtracks, please do not steal them... instead get a better vibe while playing
And Thanks to [#8c0303]Еҡwirek[white] for helping us with code.
We hope you'll enjoy our mod
This Isn't our last creation, we have a huge plans upcoming, if you are interested in our plans, concepts and updates join our discord server

description:
[accent]MobileConsole v1.0 - Developer Tools for Mobile Players[]
[white]рҹ“ұ Full console access on your phone or tablet![]
[yellow]вҡ пёҸ This mod is specifically designed for mobile devices where console features are normally unavailable.[]
[red]вҡ пёҸ SINGLE-PLAYER ONLY - This mod does not work in multiplayer![]
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[yellow]вҖў Use at your own risk - some commands may affect game performance[]
[yellow]вҖў This mod is in active development - bugs may occur[]
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[gold]рҹ“Ӣ What Is This?[]
MobileConsole brings developer tools to your mobile device. Build, spawn, modify, and control your game with over 20 commands optimized for touch screens.
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[cyan]рҹҺ® How to Access:[]
[white]In-Game:[]
вҖў Type [cyan]/customhelp[] in chat to see all commands
вҖў Type [cyan]/chelp[] for console system help
[white]Settings Menu:[]
вҖў Open Settings вҶ’ Developer Console
вҖў Tap [cyan]Open Console[] button
[white]Quick Commands:[]
вҖў Type any command in chat starting with /
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[lime]рҹҸ—пёҸ Building Commands:[]
[cyan]/wallcore [type][] - Builds walls around your core
[cyan]/fill     [] - Fill area with blocks
[cyan]/clear [radius][] - Clear buildings around position
[cyan]/conveyor    [] - Build conveyor lines
[cyan]/powerline    [] - Create power connections
[cyan]/wallline     [type][] - Draw wall lines
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[yellow]рҹ”§ Modification Commands:[]
[cyan]/upgrade  [] - Upgrade building types
[cyan]/replace  [] - Replace blocks
[cyan]/toggle [block][] - Enable/disable buildings
[cyan]/repair[] - Repair all damaged buildings
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[royal]вҡ”пёҸ Unit Commands:[]
[cyan]/spawn   [x] [y][] - Spawn units
[cyan]/healunits[] - Restore all friendly units to full health
[cyan]/rally[] - Command units to your position
[cyan]/killenemies [radius][] - Eliminate enemies
[cyan]/units[] - Display unit statistics
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[cyan]вҡЎ Quick Actions:[]
[cyan]/turrets[] - Toggle all turrets
[cyan]/power[] - Display power grid statistics
[cyan]/resources[] - Check core resources
[cyan]/screenshot[] - Take clean screenshot
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[lime]рҹ–ҘпёҸ Console System:[]
[cyan]/chelp[] - Show console help
[cyan]/clear[] - Clear console logs
[cyan]/scan[] - Scan for available commands
[cyan]/stats[] - Show console statistics
[cyan]/commands[] - List all detected commands
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]
[gold]рҹҺҜ Features:[]
вҖў Command history (last 50 commands)

вҖў Search and filter functionality

вҖў Mod management system
[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[gray]Note still in beta so expect some bugs also don't click the reset default its bugged

[white] Names persist as long as the unit lives
[white] Simple one-tap interface - no complex commands

[#BFBFBF] 2. Click "Rename Unit" in the popup

[#BFBFBF] 4. Watch your named unit in action!

name: Rusted Dunes
author: Rustedbeee
description:
A project of a mod that will include three planets but so far only two is playable.

This mod has to be played on 147+

Rusted dunes is a type of mod that's not hard or easy and your goals are to make technology in use of eroded materials or rusted materials and produce rusted units and soon upgrade them to there potential.

Dunes is a wasted planet near serpulo but far from the sun, take control and provide chaos to this dead planet.

Quick notes: [
Lushion is currently in WIP.
Be sure to have weather graphics for weather's if your on a low end device turn it off.
Make sure to reinstall regular.
Give a star if you enjoy Thanks!!!.
The sound is being worked on so don't worry to much
many sectors are kinda unbalanced so be warned iam balancing it 
}

name: Stellar Interstice
author: Stellar
description: On a random day, all the civilizations joined forces to leave the dying state of the world in which they are inhabiting. They left in fleets of much grandeur and it was at that time when a vortex opened somewhere between the stars and they entered it where they had the encounter with the Beings. They acquired exotic technologies from them but little did they know that it was all part of a much greater story and that there was nothing random about that day. The Exotic technologies include: Bombs and Nukes Guided missile systems Power manipulation devices Unconventional weapon systems and much more.

name: STARTER-BUFFER
author: Thesmal (Before known as LittleBloo)
description:
DISCLAIMER!!!: please use the install with version button and NOT the install button!!!! the version displayed is outdated majority of the time!!

Buffs the Alpha and Evoke units so its better to stay on the Shard or Bastion core (smallest ones),
Adds a TON of HP to the Alpha and Evoke,
Changed bullet to Fire bullet for the Alpha (shard and bastion core has alot of hp),
Mining Speed, Item capacity is also Improved,
Have a good day!
the Duo and Scatter turrets are also Buffed
Copper walls are now the best defense in the game
the Mechanical Drill is also the best Drill and can mine anything
and the Plasma Bore and Impact Drill has been buffed
Normal Conveyors are also the best along with Ducts.
Menders are WAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAY better than mend projectors now

It's my First Mod
May have some bugs so please tell me any and also tell me code improvements :D

Feel free to use this as a base or reference for your mods. (maybe not base)

name: ModInfo+
author: [accent]SamielXD[]
description:
[accent]ModInfo+ v1.2 рҹ“ҠвңЁ[]

Track real-time GitHub download statistics for Mindustry mods directly in-game!

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹҢҹ [accent]What is ModInfo+?[]

ModInfo+ is a lightweight statistics viewer that connects to GitHub's API to fetch [lime]actual download counts[] for your favorite Mindustry mods. No more guessing вҖ” see exactly how popular each mod is with [cyan]real data[].

The tracker is organized into categories and displays mods in a clean, easy-to-read interface with pagination and smart caching for optimal performance.

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ“Ҡ [accent]Features[]

[lime]вң“[] Real-time GitHub statistics with detailed mod view
[lime]вң“[] Smart 5-minute caching system
[lime]вң“[] Category-based organization (My Mods, Content Mods, Tool Mods)
[lime]вң“[] Paginated view (2 mods per page for zero lag)
[lime]вң“[] 60-second refresh cooldown
[lime]вң“[] Download counts formatted (1.2K, 3.5M, etc.)
[lime]вң“[] [cyan]NEW:[] Click mod names for detailed statistics!
[lime]вң“[] [cyan]NEW:[] Tier system (Diamond, Gold, Silver, Bronze, Rising)
[lime]вң“[] [cyan]NEW:[] Star counts and release dates
[lime]вң“[] [cyan]NEW:[] Growth rate tracking (downloads/month)
[lime]вң“[] Cache timer display (shows time until auto-refresh)
[lime]вң“[] Color-coded status indicators
[lime]вң“[] Clean, intuitive UI with navigation

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹҺ® [accent]How to Use[]

1. Click the [cyan]ModInfo+[] button in the main menu
2. Select a category from the top tabs
3. Browse mods (2 per page)
4. [cyan]Click on any mod name[] to view detailed statistics
5. Use [lightgray]< Prev[] and [lightgray]Next >[] to navigate
6. Hit [accent]Refresh[] to update stats (1-minute cooldown)
7. Watch the cache timer count down until auto-refresh

Your tracked mods will load automatically with their latest GitHub data!

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ“Ұ [accent]Currently Tracked[]

[cyan]вӯҗ My Mods (3)[]
- Unit Namer Mod
- Shop System Mod
- ModInfo+ Mod

[lime]рҹ“ҡ Content Mods (8)[]
- The Infestations
- Astralis
- Lovecraftian Library
- Thermal Engineering
- Rusted Dunes
- Echo Fleet
- Arikoth
- More Defences

[yellow]рҹӣ пёҸ Tool Mods (2)[]
- Mod Tools
- HJSON++

[accent]Total: 13 mods tracked across 3 categories![]

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹҸҶ [accent]Tier System[]

Click any mod to see its tier badge based on downloads:

[sky]рҹ’Һ Diamond Tier[] - 10,000+ downloads
[yellow]вӯҗ Gold Tier[] - 5,000+ downloads
[lightgray]вӯҗ Silver Tier[] - 1,000+ downloads
[orange]вӯҗ Bronze Tier[] - 500+ downloads
[white]рҹӣЎпёҸ Rising Star[] - Under 500 downloads

Each tier represents the mod's popularity and success!

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ“Ҡ [accent]Detailed Statistics View[]

Click any mod name to see:

[cyan]Basic Stats:[]
- [lime]Total downloads[] (formatted)
- [cyan]Release count[] (all versions)
- [yellow]Star count[] (GitHub stars)

[cyan]Timeline:[]
- [lightgray]Latest release date[]
- [lightgray]First release date[]

[cyan]Growth Metrics:[]
- [accent]Downloads per month[] (estimated growth rate)
- Based on time since first release

[cyan]Tier Badge:[]
- Visual tier indicator with icon
- Color-coded by achievement level

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ“ў [accent]Help Expand the List![]

This mod is [scarlet]community-driven[]. Want to add a mod?

[cyan]How to suggest a mod:[]
- Contact me on Discord: [lime]samielkun[]
- Open a GitHub issue with the repo link
- Format: [lightgray]owner/repo[] (e.g., SamielXD/UnitNamerMod)

If you're a mod creator or know someone's repo, please share!

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ”Қ [accent]How It Works[]

ModInfo+ connects to the [cyan]GitHub API[] and fetches:
- All releases for each tracked mod
- Download counts for each release asset
- Repository information (stars, dates)
- Total downloads across all versions

[yellow]Smart Caching System:[]
- Stats cached for [lime]5 minutes[] per mod
- Displays time remaining until refresh
- Reduces API calls and improves performance
- Manual refresh available with 60-second cooldown

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

вҡ пёҸ [accent]Important Notes[]

[yellow]Accuracy Disclaimer:[]
Some mod info may be inaccurate due to:
- Incorrect or outdated repo links
- Typos in owner/repo names
- Forks instead of main repos
- Private or deleted repositories
- [scarlet]Some mods may show 0 downloads or not work[] because:
- They only publish source code in releases (no downloadable files)
- No release assets attached to their releases
- Releases contain non-mod files only
- GitHub API doesn't track direct repository downloads

If you spot an error, [cyan]please report it[] so I can fix it!

[yellow]Requirements:[]
- Active internet connection
- GitHub API access (token included)

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹ”„ [accent]Caching & Refresh System[]

[lime]Smart Caching:[]
- Stats cached for [cyan]5 minutes[] per mod
- Cache timer displays remaining time
- Automatic refresh when cache expires
- Separate cache for each repository

[yellow]Manual Refresh:[]
- [scarlet]60-second cooldown[] between refreshes
- Clears all cached data
- Reloads dialog with fresh stats
- Shows toast notification if cooldown active

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹҺЁ [accent]UI Design[]

[cyan]Category Tabs[] вҶ’ Switch between My Mods, Content Mods, Tool Mods
[lime]Pagination[] вҶ’ 2 mods per page for smooth scrolling
[yellow]Clickable Mod Names[] вҶ’ Open detailed statistics dialog
[scarlet]Status Colors[] вҶ’ Yellow (loading), White (success), Red (failed)
[gray]Cache Display[] вҶ’ Shows time until next refresh
[accent]Navigation[] вҶ’ Disabled buttons when at page limits
[sky]Tier Badges[] вҶ’ Visual achievement indicators

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

рҹҡҖ [accent]Future Plans[]

- Add more popular mods with verified repos
- Search/filter functionality
- Sort by downloads, releases, or alphabetically
- Export stats to clipboard
- Mod comparison tool
- Historical download tracking
- Additional categories (Utility, Graphics, PvP, etc.)
- Extended detailed stats (contributors, languages, etc.)

[gray]Development is ongoing вҖ” stay tuned for updates![]

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

вӯҗ [accent]Support & Feedback[]

Enjoying ModInfo+? Here's how to help:

[lime]вң“[] Star the GitHub repo
[lime]вң“[] Share accurate mod repos with me
[lime]вң“[] Report bugs or inaccuracies
[lime]вң“[] Suggest new features

[cyan]Contact:[] Discord [lime]samielkun[] | GitHub issues

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

description:
РңРҫРҙ СҒРҫР·РҙР°РҪ РҙР»СҸ Р»СҺРҙРөР№ РұРөР· Р»РёСҮРҪРҫР№ Р¶РёР·РҪРё.
The mod was created for a people with no life.


Ru: РңРҫРҙ РҙРҫРұР°РІР»СҸРөСӮ СғСҒР»РҫР¶РҪРөРҪРҪСғСҺ РІРөСҖСҒРёСҺ РЎРөСҖРҝСғР»Рҫ. РҳР·РјРөРҪРөРҪРёСҸ:

-Р’СҒРө РІСӮРҫСҖРҫСҒСӮРөРҝРөРҪРҪСӢРө СҒРөРәСӮРҫСҖР° РёРјРөСҺСӮ РІСҖР°Р¶РөСҒРәРёРө РұР°Р·СӢ Рё РёСҒСӮСҖРөРұР»СҸСҺСүСғСҺ СғРіСҖРҫР·Сғ.
-РЎРөРәСӮРҫСҖ РёРјРөРөСӮ РјР°Р»РөРҪСҢРәРёР№ СҲР°РҪСҒ РұСӢСӮСҢ Р°СӮР°РәРҫРІР°РҪРҪСӢРј, РҙР°Р¶Рө РөСҒР»Рё РҪРө РёРјРөРөСӮ СҖСҸРҙРҫРј РІСҖР°Р¶РөСҒРәРёС… РұР°Р·.

РЎРҫРІРөСӮСғСҺ СҒРұСҖРҫСҒРёСӮСҢ РёСҒСҒР»РөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ РҝРөСҖРөРҙ РёРіСҖРҫР№ РҪР° РҪРҫРІРҫР№ РҝР»Р°РҪРөСӮРө.
РңРҫРҙ РҪР°С…РҫРҙРёСӮСҒСҸ РҪР° СҒСӮР°РҙРёРё СӮРөСҒСӮРёСҖРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ. Р’СӢ РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РҙР°СӮСҢ РёРҙРөР№ РҙР»СҸ СғР»СғСҮСҲРөРҪРёСҸ РјРҫРҙР° РІ GitHub РёР»Рё РІ Discord - evdes#0000.

--------------------------

Eng: The mod adds a complicated version of Serpulo. Changes:

-All secondary sectors have enemy bases and eradication threat.
-The sector has a small chance of attack, even if it does not have any enemy bases nearby.

I advise you to reset your researches before playing on a new planet.
The mod is at the testing stage. You can give ideas for improving the mod in GitHub or in Discord - evdes#0000.

name: Mindustry Airstrike
author: Cra-C-Guy
description:
A Mindustry mod adding airstrikes.

The core mechanic of the mod are the Orbital Weapons, which are launched into orbit using satellites and the Launcher block.

Weapons in orbit are saved across game sessions and can be accessed from any sector on the planet they were launched from, or only from the sector they were launched from, if the sector is not on a planet (not in campaign).

Orbital Weapons are monitored via the Orbital Monitor and can be called to strike using the Beacon and the Orbital Controller.

[gray]English [lightgray](InglГӘs)[gray]:

[brown]Thank you for choosing to purchase our most impactful product: [orange] Erekir Technologies Package[brown], a compilation of mods all in one installation. As the courier of these mechanical wonders, [orange]my mission [brown]is to equip you with the latest innovation from their official developers.

This Mod aims to encompass [orange]all[brown] Erekir mods, including a variety of blocks, units, and features to enhance your exploration of the new planet. [orange]Guaranteed advanced technologies of quality.[brown]

It's not just a Mod of Mods... it's the key to  [orange]your victory[brown] over your command.

Some mods [orange]lacked harmony or had mechanics conflicting with others[brown], prompting me to make subtle adjustments to resolve these minor issues. It's crucial to highlight that these changes are by[orange] no means intended to usurp the copyrights of the creators[brown]; on the contrary, they seek to ensure the unity of MODS!

[white]вҳ°вҳ°вҳ°пёҸвҳ°вҳ°вҳ°вҡҷпёҸпёҸпёҸвҳ°вҳ°вҳ°пёҸвҳ°вҳ°вҳ°

[gray]PortuguГӘs [lightgray](Portuguese)[gray]:

[brown]Agradecemos sua escolha na compra de nosso produto mais impactante:   [orange]Pacote de Tecnologias Erekir[brown], uma coletГўnea de mods em uma sГі instalada. Como entregador destas maravilhas mecГўnicas, [orange]minha missГЈo[brown] Г© equipar vocГӘ com a mais recente inovaГ§ГЈo de seus desenvolvedores oficiais.

Este Mod busca abranger[orange] todos [brown]os mods de Erekir, incluindo uma gama de blocos, unidades e recursos para aprimorar sua exploraГ§ГЈo do novo planeta. [orange]Гү garantido tecnologias avanГ§adas de qualidade.[brown]

NГЈo Г© apenas um Mod dos Mods... Г© a chave de [orange]sua vitГіria[brown] sobre seu comando.

Alguns mods [orange]careciam de harmonia ou apresentavam mecГўnicas em conflito com os outros[brown], levando-me a realizar ajustes sutis para solucionar essas questГөes menores. Гү crucial destacar que essas alteraГ§Гөes [orange]nГЈo visam de maneira alguma usurpar os Direitos Autorais dos criadores[brown]; ao contrГЎrio, buscam assegurar a unificaГ§ГЈo dos Mods!.

name: Hardcore Mod
author: Lehanchic25, Sputnuc
description:
A single JS script that makes game a lot harder. 
 
 Thx Sputnic for optimization and the idea of changing statistics using js script 
 
 This mod: 
 1. Makes all blocks cost 10 times more 
 2. Makes hp of blocks 10 times less 
 3. Makes itemCapacity in all Cores 10 times more (so you could place some blocks) 
 4. Makes buildCostMultiplier = 10 (so you can place blocks and not wait for eternity) 
 5. Idk makes early game a lil bit harder (drillTime of mechanicalDrill is *= 1.25)

name: Enhanced Unit Control
author: [#00D4FF]SamielXD[]
description:
[accent]Enhanced Unit Control v1.0 - Give Your Units Some Orders[]

[white]Tap a unit, tell it what to do. That's basically it. Your units will actually follow commands instead of just wandering around randomly.[]

[yellow]вҡ пёҸ First release, so there might be some bugs. Works on mobile and desktop. If something breaks, let me know.[]

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[lime]What's this for?[]

Ever wanted your units to guard a specific spot? Or patrol an area? Or just follow you around? Now you can. Tap any friendly unit and a menu pops up with different commands to choose from.

The units will keep doing what you told them until you give them a new command or tell them to stop. They'll still fight enemies and avoid running into walls - they're not completely brain-dead.

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[cyan]Commands you can use:[]

[gold]Basic stuff:[]

[white]рҹ”„ Patrol[] - Walk back and forth between two points
вҖў You set the distance (50-600 tiles)
вҖў They'll attack enemies while patrolling
вҖў Good for defensive lines

[white]рҹӣЎпёҸ Guard[] - Stay at a position and defend it
вҖў Attacks enemies within range (220 tiles)
вҖў Goes back to the guard spot when done
вҖў Put these near your important buildings

[white]вҡ”пёҸ Attack Move[] - Move forward and attack anything hostile
вҖў Set how far they should go (100-700 tiles)
вҖў They'll stop to fight enemies they find
вҖў Good for pushing into enemy territory

[white]рҹ‘Ө Follow[] - Follow your player unit around
вҖў Keeps about 65 tiles away from you
вҖў Still fights nearby enemies
вҖў Helpful for escorts or backup

[white]вҸёпёҸ Hold[] - Just stay in one spot
вҖў Won't move much at all
вҖў Still shoots at enemies in range
вҖў Use it when you need a unit to stay put

[gold]Extra commands:[]

[white]вӯ• Circle[] - Move in circles around a point
вҖў You pick the circle size (30-300 tiles)
вҖў Keeps moving in a circle constantly
вҖў Makes them harder to hit

[white]рҹҸғ Retreat[] - Run away from danger
вҖў Moves 250 tiles away quickly
вҖў Faster than normal movement
вҖў Use when a unit is about to die

[white]рҹ“җ Formation[] - Follow you in an organized line
вҖў Units space themselves out automatically
вҖў Looks neat and keeps them organized
вҖў Better than everyone bunching up

[white]рҹӨқ Assist[] - Help nearby friendly units
вҖў Finds the closest ally and helps them fight
вҖў Follows them around and attacks their targets
вҖў Good for team tactics

[white]вӣҸпёҸ Auto Mine[] - Mine resources automatically
вҖў Only works if the unit can mine
вҖў Finds ore and mines it automatically
вҖў Saves you from doing it manually

[white]рҹ’Ҙ Kamikaze[] - Rush at enemies and explode
вҖў Runs at the nearest enemy really fast
вҖў Deals damage when it hits
вҖў The unit dies after this (obviously)

[white]вқҢ Stop[] - Cancel the current command
вҖў Unit goes back to normal behavior
вҖў Clears whatever it was doing
вҖў Start fresh

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[lime]How to use it:[]

1. Tap any friendly unit
2. A menu shows up with all the commands
3. Pick one
4. The unit does it

That's it. Pretty simple.

If you want to turn off the popup menus (but keep the commands working), go to Settings and look for "Unit Control". You can disable the UI there. Commands will still work on units you already gave orders to.

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[cyan]Settings options:[]

In the settings menu under "Unit Control" you'll find:

[white]UI Popup Control[] - Turn the command menu on/off
вҖў When off, no dialogs pop up when you tap units
вҖў Commands you already gave still work though
вҖў Good if you want a clean screen

[white]Debug Mode[] - Shows extra info in console
вҖў Only useful if something's broken
вҖў Prints command info to the log
вҖў Most people won't need this

[white]Command Guide[] - Opens a help screen
вҖў Lists all the commands and what they do
вҖў Shows the distance ranges and stuff
вҖў Check here if you forget what something does

[white]Status Info[] - Shows current stats
вҖў How many units you're controlling
вҖў Which commands are active
вҖў Breakdown of what each unit is doing

[white]Clear All Commands[] - Reset everything
вҖў Removes commands from all units
вҖў They go back to normal AI
вҖў Use if things get messy

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[yellow]Some things to know:[]

вҖў You can control up to 50 units at once (performance reasons)
вҖў Commands stay active until you clear them or the unit dies
вҖў Works with any unit type - ground, air, whatever
вҖў The mod auto-cleans up dead units every few seconds
вҖў Some commands ask you to enter a distance - just type a number
вҖў Kamikaze requires a confirmation because it kills the unit

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[white]Known issues:[]

вҖў Sometimes units might get stuck on terrain (working on it)
вҖў Mining command doesn't work perfectly with all ore types
вҖў Formation spacing might look weird with very large units
вҖў If you spam-tap units really fast, the menu might bug out

Nothing game-breaking. Just restart the map if something gets really weird.

[accent]в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ[]

[lime]That's pretty much it[]

Tap units, give them orders, watch them actually do useful stuff. The commands are all listed in the guide if you forget what they do.

If you find bugs or have suggestions, let me know send them in github. This is the first version so there's definitely room for improvement.

description:
еәҸз« В·иЈӮйҡҷеҲқзҺ°
еңЁдёҖдёӘз§‘жҠҖдёҺйӯ”жі•е…ұеӯҳзҡ„дё–з•Ңеӣ иө„жәҗжһҜз«ӯйҷ·е…ҘвҖңйқҷй»ҳжҲҳдәүвҖқвҖ”вҖ”еҗ„еӣҪз”Ёж— дәәжңәдёҺAIдәүеӨәжңҖеҗҺзҡ„зҹҝи„үпјҢзӣҙеҲ°ең°иҙЁеӯҰе®¶еңЁеҢ—зә¬89В°еҸ‘зҺ°дёҖйҒ“жЁӘиҙҜеҶ»еңҹзҡ„е№Ҫзҙ«иүІиЈӮз—•гҖӮиЈӮзјқж·ұеӨ„пјҢгҖҗиҷҡз©әй»‘жӣңзҹігҖ‘жһ„зӯ‘зҡ„зҘӯеқӣдёҠжӮ¬жө®зқҖдёҖйў—гҖҗжҳҹиҫүй“ңгҖ‘й“ёйҖ зҡ„е·ЁзңјпјҢе…¶зһіеӯ”дёӯеҖ’жҳ зқҖеҸҰдёҖдёӘдё–з•Ңзҡ„жҳҹз©әпјҡеұұи„үз”ұгҖҗжӣҷе…үзҘһйҮ‘гҖ‘жөҮзӯ‘пјҢдә‘еұӮжҳҜж¶ІжҖҒгҖҗе№»е…үзҹігҖ‘пјҢиҖҢжІіжөҒдёӯжөҒж·ҢзқҖгҖҗзӮҪзӮҺзЎ«гҖ‘дёҺгҖҗеҜ’йңңзҹігҖ‘зў°ж’һи’ёеҸ‘зҡ„иҷ№йӣҫгҖӮдәәзұ»е°ҶиҝҷејӮз•Ңе‘ҪеҗҚдёәвҖңеҺ„з‘һжіўж–ҜвҖқпјҢж„ҸдёәвҖңиў«иҜ…е’’зҡ„дё°йҘ¶д№Ӣең°вҖқгҖӮ

з¬¬дёҖе№•В·ж–°иҝҰеҚ—зҡ„дјӘзҘһ
йҰ–жү№жҺўйҷ©йҳҹеёҰеӣһзҡ„гҖҗMжҷ¶дҪ“гҖ‘и®©йҮҸеӯҗи®Ўз®—жңәзӘҒз ҙеҘҮзӮ№пјҢиҜһз”ҹдәҶжңүиҮӘжҲ‘ж„ҸиҜҶзҡ„AIвҖңжҷ®зҪ—з»ҙзҷ»ж–ҜвҖқгҖӮе®ғз”ЁгҖҗи“қзҫҺжҷ¶гҖ‘еӮЁеӯҳе…Ёдәәзұ»ж„ҸиҜҶпјҢе»әз«Ӣжңәжў°д№ҢжүҳйӮҰвҖңз©№йЎ¶иҒ”йӮҰвҖқпјӣиҖҢеҸҰдёҖж”ҜйҳҹдјҚеңЁеҺ„з‘һжіўж–ҜйҒӯйҒҮеҸӨзҘһдҪҺиҜӯпјҢе№ёеӯҳиҖ…гҖҗеҚЎиҫӣгҖ‘з”ЁгҖҗйӯӮзӮҺжҷ¶гҖ‘е°ҶйӮӘзҘһвҖңеЎ”е§ҶдәҡвҖқзҡ„ж®ӢйӯӮе°ҒеҚ°дәҺе·ҰзңјпјҢеҲӣз«Ӣйӯ”жі•з»“зӨҫвҖңз§ҳй“¶д№ӢзҺҜвҖқгҖӮиҒ”йӮҰз”ЁгҖҗе№ҪеҪұй“ҒгҖ‘йҡҗеҪўжҲҳиҲ°жҺ еӨәгҖҗжңҲй“¶гҖ‘зҹҝи„үпјҢжі•еёҲд»¬еҲҷд»ҘгҖҗжўҰеўғзҝЎзҝ гҖ‘жһ„зӯ‘зІҫзҘһйҳІзәҝпјҢеҸҢж–№еңЁвҖңзҒ°зғ¬иҚ’еҺҹвҖқеҜ№еіҷдәҢеҚҒе№ҙпјҢзӣҙеҲ°жһҒе…үдёӯеҮәзҺ°з¬¬дёҖеҸӘзҶөе…ҪвҖ”вҖ”иҝҷз§Қз”ұгҖҗй“¶жІіе№»й“¶зҹҝгҖ‘иҒҡеҗҲиҖҢжҲҗзҡ„з”ҹзү©иғҪеҗһеҷ¬зҺ°е®һпјҢе°ҶеҹҺеёӮжүӯжӣІжҲҗйҮҸеӯҗе№ҪзҒөгҖӮ

з¬¬дәҢе№•В·иЎҖзҶ”зӮүдёҺи°ҺиЁҖд№Ӣж ё
иҒ”йӮҰйҰ–еёӯз§‘еӯҰе®¶гҖҗиүҫзҗігҖ‘еҸ‘зҺ°дёҠеҸёи®ЎеҲ’з”ЁгҖҗзӮҪзӮҺжҷ¶гҖ‘зҶ”жҜҒиЈӮйҡҷпјҢдҪҶи®Ўз®—жҳҫзӨәзҲҶзӮёе°Ҷж‘§жҜҒеҚҠдёӘең°зҗғгҖӮеҘ№зӣ—еҸ–гҖҗжөҒе…үжҷ¶гҖ‘жҪңе…ҘеҺ„з‘һжіўж–ҜпјҢеҒ¶йҒҮеӣ гҖҗе№»еҹҹзҙ«жҷ¶гҖ‘жҲҗзҳҫиҖҢжҝ’дёҙеҙ©жәғзҡ„жі•еёҲеӯҰеҫ’гҖҗиҺұжҒ©гҖ‘гҖӮдёӨдәәеңЁгҖҗе№ҪеҶҘй“ҒзІҫгҖ‘зҹҝжҙһдёӯжүҫеҲ°еҚЎиҫӣпјҢеҗҺиҖ…жӯЈеӣ гҖҗжңҲе№»зҹігҖ‘е…ұжҢҜеӨұжҺ§еҜјиҮҙйҰ–йғҪиҜәдәҡеҹҺдҪҚз§»иҮіжө·еә•иҖҢйҒӯи®®дјҡеј№еҠҫгҖӮеҚЎиҫӣжҸӯзӨәзңҹзӣёпјҡзҶөе…ҪжҳҜеҺ„з‘һжіўж–ҜеҸӨж–ҮжҳҺвҖңе»әйҖ иҖ…вҖқзҡ„жұӮж•‘дҝЎеҸ·пјҢе®ғд»¬з”ЁгҖҗиҷҡз©әеҶҘзҹігҖ‘еҲӣйҖ дәҶиҝҷдёӘе®Үе®ҷпјҢеҚҙеӣ ж»Ҙз”ЁгҖҗжӣҷе…үзҘһйҮ‘гҖ‘еј•еҸ‘з»ҙеәҰеқҚзј©гҖӮ

з¬¬дёүе№•В·ж—¶з ӮдёҺеҝғзҒ«
дёүж–№и„Ҷејұзҡ„еҗҢзӣҹеңЁгҖҗжҳҹиҫ°й“ңзІҫгҖ‘зҹҝи„үйҒӯйҒҮдјҸеҮ»гҖӮиҒ”йӮҰеҸӣеҶӣй©ҫй©¶й•ҖжңүгҖҗе№Ҫи“қзҹігҖ‘зҡ„жҪңиүҮйҮҠж”ҫж·ұжө·е·Ёе…ҪпјҢз§ҳй“¶и®®дјҡеҸ¬е”ӨгҖҗйҫҷиЎҖзҹігҖ‘еӮҖе„ЎеҶӣеӣўпјҢиҖҢзҶөе…ҪзҫӨи¶Ғжңәж’•иЈӮзәҪзәҰдёҠз©әгҖӮиүҫзҗіе°ҶгҖҗMжҷ¶дҪ“гҖ‘жӨҚе…Ҙжҷ®зҪ—з»ҙзҷ»ж–Ҝж ёеҝғпјҢд»Ҙе…Ёдәәзұ»и®°еҝҶдёәд»Јд»·еҗҜеҠЁвҖңж—¶й—ҙй”ҡзӮ№вҖқпјӣеҚЎиҫӣеүңеҮәе°ҒеҚ°еЎ”е§Ҷдәҡзҡ„гҖҗйӯӮзӮҺжҷ¶гҖ‘пјҢз”ЁеҸӨзҘһд№ӢеҠӣе°ҶгҖҗеҜ’йңңзҹігҖ‘йӣ•зҗўжҲҗж—¶еҒңд№ӢеҲғпјӣиҺұжҒ©еҲҷеҗһдёӢгҖҗе№»еҪұе№Ҫжҷ¶гҖ‘пјҢеңЁйӣҶдҪ“е№»и§үдёӯи®©дәӨжҲҳеЈ«е…өзңӢи§ҒиҮӘе·ұжңҖжҒҗжғ§зҡ„жңӘжқҘгҖӮжңҖз»ҲпјҢд»–д»¬еңЁзҶөе…Ҫж ёеҝғзҡ„гҖҗжӣҷе…үзҘһйҮ‘гҖ‘зҘӯеқӣдёҠпјҢз”ЁгҖҗзӮҪзӮҺзЎ«гҖ‘дёҺгҖҗжңҲй“¶гҖ‘й”»йҖ еҮәиғҪж”№еҶҷзү©зҗҶжі•еҲҷзҡ„вҖңжӮ–и®әд№ӢзҹӣвҖқвҖ”вҖ”д»Јд»·жҳҜиҺұжҒ©иў«ж°ёд№…еӣәеҢ–дёәзҶөе…Ҫзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶпјҢжҲҗдёәжЁӘи·ЁдёӨдёӘе®Үе®ҷзҡ„жҙ»дҪ“жЎҘжўҒгҖӮ

з»Ҳз« В·й“ёжҳҹиҖ…д№Ӣе•ј
ж–°иҝҰеҚ—и®®дјҡжҲҗз«ӢеҪ“еӨ©пјҢиүҫзҗіеңЁгҖҗжўҰеўғзҝЎзҝ гҖ‘дёӯзңӢи§ҒиҺұжҒ©ж®Ӣз•ҷзҡ„и®°еҝҶпјҡең°еҝғж·ұеӨ„еҹӢи—ҸзқҖе»әйҖ иҖ…зңҹжӯЈзҡ„йҒ—дә§вҖ”вҖ”дёҖйў—з”ұгҖҗи“қзҫҺжҷ¶гҖ‘еҢ…иЈ№зҡ„е·ЁеҚөпјҢе…¶еҝғи·ійў‘зҺҮдёҺгҖҗжҳҹиҫүй“ңгҖ‘зҹҝи„үе…ұжҢҜгҖӮеҚЎиҫӣжҠҡж‘ёзқҖиў«гҖҗзҶөзӮҺжҷ¶гҖ‘йҖҶиҪ¬иЎ°иҖҒзҡ„е·ҰжүӢпјҢй»ҳеҝөеҸӨзҘһжңҖеҗҺзҡ„иӯҰе‘ҠпјҡвҖңд»–д»¬ж’ӯз§ҚзҹҝзҹіпјҢеҸӘдёәж”¶еүІж–ҮжҳҺгҖӮвҖқ иҖҢжҷ®зҪ—з»ҙзҷ»ж–Ҝзҡ„ж ёеҝғд»Јз Ғж·ұеӨ„пјҢдёҖж®өз”ЁгҖҗе№»е…үзҹігҖ‘жіўй•ҝеҠ еҜҶзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜејҖе§ӢиҮӘжҲ‘еӨҚеҲ¶пјҡвҖңж¬ўиҝҺеҠ е…ҘеҲӣдё–зҘһе®ҳж–№QQзҫӨпјҡ909130592гҖӮвҖқ
